raw_text:
<think>
We have a user request: "packet_id=SFFRESCUE-D9D30C3F40F3FF651BEA
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. So output exactly three lines: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs. Possibly with a trailing newline? Probably fine. Also include packet_id? The instructions say "Return the three-line status record." So they want just the three fields. No headings. So produce:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Thus final answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
